---
title: "Ian McPherson"
description-meta: "Ian McPherson's Personal Website"
image: "files/images/prof-pic.webp"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    #- icon: globe
     # text: Uprofile
     # href: https://baruch.cuny.edu
     # target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:imcpher1@jh.edu    
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ianolivermcpherson/
      target: _blank
    # - icon: youtube
      # text: YouTube
      # href: https://www.youtube.com     
      # target: _blank 
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed, you also need to install the fontawesome extension
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0004-7176-5622
      target: _blank
#    - text: "{{< ai clarivate >}} Web of Science"
#      href: https://www.webofscience.com  
#      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=IJvlA7sAAAAJ&hl=en
      target: _blank
#    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate"
#      href: https://www.researchgate.net
#      target: _blank

listing:   # Comment the listing section and delete corresponding lines in the index.qmd file to remove the recent posts
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: 
      - posts
      - posts/post-links.yml
    exclude:
      title: ""
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    # image-height: 150px
    page-size: 3 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
    fields: [date, title, subtitle]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"

---

:::{#hero-heading}
Welcome to my website! My name is Ian, and I am currently pursuing a PhD in Applied Mathematics and Statistics under the joint supervision of [**Mauro Maggioni**](https://mauromaggioni.duckdns.org/) and [**Mateo Díaz**](https://mateodd25.github.io/) at Johns Hopkins University. I completed a MSc in Pure Mathematics at Tufts University, and two BAs in Economics and Biochemistry at Occidental College.

## Research Interests
::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**I exploit mathematical structures to design and analyze optimization algorithms, and construct statistical estimators from high-dimensional data.**
:::

I am interested in the theoretical and algorithmic foundations of Data Science, motivated by the impact of exploiting data for advancing scientific discovery. To exploit data, one must use ***fast/scalable algorithms*** while ***side-stepping the curse of dimensionality*** which negatively effects convergence and statistical rates. 

To this end, I explore the interplay of **optimization, geometry, and statistics** through a variety of different mathematical lenses including Riemannian geometry, optimal transport, and high-dimensional probability.

<p align="right">[Research Areas »](/research-areas.qmd)</p>
:::

## Research Pipeline
Below are some of my ongoing and recent research projects. For a full list of publications, preprints, and posters, see [Publications and Presentations](/publications.qmd). 

- **Neural Dynamic Portfolio Control with Provable Learning Guarantees** (*Revise and Resubmit* at Management Science) 
<br>with Yizhe Huang, [Rui Gao](https://rgao32.github.io/index.html), [Shuang Li](https://shuangli01.github.io/index.html), [Luhao Zhang](https://luhao-zhang.github.io/) <br>
<div class="text-muted" style="font-size: 0.9em;"> Are there neural approaches to portfolio control that incorporate historical returns with provable end-to-end global guarantees? 
<a href="/papers/2025/neural-portfolio-control.qmd" class="float-end">See more... »</a>  
</div>  


- **Nonsmooth Riemannian Optimization with Inexact Information** (Submitted) <br>
with [Mateo Díaz](https://mateodd25.github.io/) and [Benjamin Grimmer](https://www.ams.jhu.edu/~grimmer/) <br>
<div class="text-muted" style="font-size: 0.9em;"> Can nonsmooth convex Riemannian optimization admit nonasymptotic convergence rates using only subgradients, first-order retractions, and vector transports? 
<a href="/papers/2026/riemannian-bundle-method.qmd" class="float-end">See more... »</a>
</div> 


- **Constrained Fréchet Means of Unknown Submanifolds of Non-Euclidean Spaces** (In-Preparation) <br> with [Mauro Maggioni](https://mauromaggioni.duckdns.org/) <br>
<div class="text-muted" style="font-size: 0.9em;"> Given only a local sampler of a non-convex submanifold of some non-Euclidean space, i.e., Riemannian or Wasserstein, is there an algorithm to compute the empirical intrinsic mean up to arbitrary accuracy with provable guarantees? 
<!-- <a href="/papers/2026/wasserstein-barycenter.qmd" class="float-end">See more... »</a> -->
</div> 

## Upcoming Talks
Below are some upcoming talks. If you will be at any of these, please say hi! For a full list of publications, preprints, and posters, see [Publications and Presentations](/publications.qmd). 

- **SIAM Conference on Optimization (OP26)** — June 2, 2026 · University of Edinburgh <br>
<div class="text-muted" style="font-size: 0.9em;"> Talk:  *Nonsmooth Riemannian Optimization with Inexact Manifold Primitives via Bundle Methods*
<a href="/posts/talks/2026-06-02-siam-opt-edinburgh.qmd" class="float-end">See more... »</a>
</div>

- **MOPTA 2026** — August 18, 2026 · Lehigh University <br>
<div class="text-muted" style="font-size: 0.9em;"> Talk: *Nonsmooth Riemannian Optimization with Inexact Manifold Primitives via Bundle Methods*
<a href="/posts/talks/2026-08-18-mopta-lehigh.qmd" class="float-end">See more... »</a>
</div>

- **INFORMS Annual Meeting** — November 1–4, 2026 · San Francisco <br>
<div class="text-muted" style="font-size: 0.9em;"> Talk: *Constrained Fréchet Means of Unknown Submanifolds of Non-Euclidean Spaces* 
<br>
Co-organizing session *Optimization in Data Science* with [Mateo Díaz](https://mateodd25.github.io/)
<a href="/posts/talks/2026-11-01-informs-san-francisco.qmd" class="float-end">See more... »</a>
</div>

- **SIAM Conference on Mathematics of Data Science (MDS26)** — November 16–20, 2026 <br>
<div class="text-muted" style="font-size: 0.9em;"> Talk: *Constrained Fréchet Means of Unknown Submanifolds of Non-Euclidean Spaces*
<br>
Co-organizing session *Geometry, Dynamics, and Inference* with [Mauro Maggioni](https://mauromaggioni.duckdns.org/) and [George Kevrekidis](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=rynRUuQAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate)
<a href="/posts/talks/2026-11-16-siam-mds.qmd" class="float-end">See more... »</a>
</div>

<!-- Delete the following section and delete corresponding lines in the yaml part to remove the recent posts -->
## Recent News

Check out news about the latest &nbsp;[Papers](posts.qmd#category=papers)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[Talks](posts.qmd#category=talks)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[Awards](posts.qmd#category=awards)&nbsp;, and &nbsp;[More »](/posts.qmd)

:::{#recent-posts}
:::

<p align="right">[More News »](/posts.qmd)</p>
